text.title: Fine-tuning Frameworks: LLaMA-Factory, Unsloth, Axolotl, TRL
text.summary: Framework comparison and quick-start commands for the four main open-model fine-tuning frameworks with their respective tradeoffs.

rule.statement: Use Unsloth for speed and memory efficiency on a single GPU; use Axolotl for complex multi-GPU scenarios with YAML-driven configuration; use TRL directly for DPO/ORPO alignment.
rule.rationale: Unsloth's custom CUDA kernels provide 2x speed and 80% less VRAM than vanilla HF training. Axolotl's YAML config enables reproducible multi-GPU runs. TRL owns the alignment trainer implementations.

list.item: Unsloth: 2x faster, 80% less VRAM, GGUF export, consumer GPU first — best for quick experiments
LLaMA-Factory: WebUI available, 100+ model families, all training methods — best for no-code iteration
Axolotl: YAML config, sample packing, Flash Attention, DeepSpeed — best for reproducible production runs
TRL: SFTTrainer, DPOTrainer, ORPOTrainer — use when alignment method is the primary concern

example.code:
# LLaMA-Factory: LoRA fine-tuning llamafactory-cli train \ --stage sft --model_name_or_path meta-llama/Llama-3.1-8B \ --finetuning_type lora --lora_rank 16 \ --lora_target q_proj,v_proj --output_dir output/llama3-lora \ --per_device_train_batch_size 2 --gradient_accumulation_steps 4 \ --learning_rate 5e-5 --num_train_epochs 3 --fp16
# LLaMA-Factory: merge LoRA adapter llamafactory-cli export \ --model_name_or_path meta-llama/Llama-3.1-8B \ --adapter_name_or_path output/llama3-lora \ --finetuning_type lora --export_dir merged_model
# Axolotl: single GPU training accelerate launch -m axolotl.cli.train config.yaml
# Axolotl: multi-GPU with DeepSpeed accelerate launch --config_file deepspeed.yaml -m axolotl.cli.train config.yaml
example.note: Always merge adapters before deploying to vLLM or TGI.

rule.statement: Pin dependency versions for Unsloth, Axolotl, and LLaMA-Factory — they update frequently and new model releases can break compatibility on unpinned installs.
rule.rationale: Framework updates often break existing configs or require new model-specific parameters; unpinned installs break silently on `pip install --upgrade`.

text.reference: Axolotl YAML config for LoRA fine-tuning of a 7B LLaMA-family model
JSONL format validator for any training API
